title: Post Misato Rei and Asuka pics here
display_title: Post Misato Rei and Asuka pics here
wikitext:
[]: Post Misato, Rei, and Asuka pics here?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Tue Jul 18, 2006 4:56 pm I dunno if there's a thread like this or not. That aside, post away!

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:35 am Hey dude Eva Monkey has a gallery of Eva. If you want pictures of the characters why not go there and have a nice search yourself? I went there and found the pictures there pretty useful.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:44 am There may be Asuka pics, but I don't see any Rei or Misato pics.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 8:22 am www.animegalleries.com , as I recall. But I recommend that you should have a few hours free time. That place is FULL with Ayanami pictures. 500 or so, when I was around there last time... Or my memory is dizzy again... :S

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 8:41 am Sweet. 8) I'll have to take a look there. Oh, and could someone post that pic where Asuka's dress blows up in the air? It's for a friend.

[]:             Quote Post by Alfonso » Wed Jul 19, 2006 8:45 am Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Sweet. 8) I'll have to take a look there. Oh, and could someone post that pic where Asuka's dress blows up in the air? It's for a friend.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 10:01 am So yeah, I went to animegalleries, and there's some really nice pictures there. Anyone else got any sites to share?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 10:06 am www.google.com Very useful, as mentioned before. www.lonelyangel.com Last time I was there there were pictures of Ayanami. Or, more accurately, screenshots. Not bad, but it is still damn far from good as I recall.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 10:08 am The problem with me and google is that I'm afraid of hentai popping up. I tried searching "Asuka Soryu" and the first pic I saw was Rei and Asuka nekkid.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 10:14 am Is that a problem? 8) A shy kid... well isn't that cute... But its wrong! Why close your eyes before something natural? Even if it is made with a pencil on a paper, and not, ahem, original . (Flesh)

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 10:29 am I just don't like nudity. Panty shots are fine but nudity is going way over the limit.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Wed Jul 19, 2006 1:16 pm Nothing wrong with that. Tho I can't guarantee that all of this is clean; http://www.roze.lv/Rei/

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 1:54 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: I just don't like nudity. Panty shots are fine but nudity is going way over the limit.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Wed Jul 19, 2006 1:59 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: I just don't like nudity. Panty shots are fine but nudity is going way over the limit.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Wed Jul 19, 2006 2:31 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: The problem with me and google is that I'm afraid of hentai popping up. I tried searching "Asuka Soryu" and the first pic I saw was Rei and Asuka nekkid.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 19, 2006 2:59 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: I just don't like nudity. Panty shots are fine but nudity is going way over the limit.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 3:52 pm I haven't seen EoE. The nudity there, though, is offical, whereas hentai would have things like semen all over the character and crap like that. EDIT: Oh, who am I kidding? They're just cartoons. But I'll just look at the stuff you guys post. EDIT2: There are two type of nudity, one of which I can handle. There's one with and one without nipples and the circle around the nipples. An example of w/o nipples was when I took a flip through a Love Hina volume.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jul 20, 2006 1:18 am Hmmm... And just how old or you mon?

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Thu Jul 20, 2006 7:06 am 14, and how about we drop the subject and post pictures already?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Jul 20, 2006 7:33 am Kaysow wrote: [url]http://www.roze.lv/Rei/[/url]
